Article.ArticleTitle: Water and wisdom: Hydration as a defence against dementia.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Neurovascular Research Laboratory, Faculty of Life Sciences and Education, University of South Wales, Pontypridd, UK.
Neurovascular Research Laboratory, Faculty of Life Sciences and Education, University of South Wales, Pontypridd, UK.
Bexorg, Inc., New Haven, Connecticut, USA.
